questions.question: A company needs a new website for its e-commerce platform. The requirements engineer has gathered the following information from stakeholders: the website must be accessible, easy to navigate, and have a secure payment system. Which of the following, based on this information, is an example of a needs and requirements relationship?

A mobile app requires users to complete a registration process. A user needs to be able to quickly and easily enter their email address. Which of the following statements correctly describes the needs and requirements relationship in this scenario?

A company's website has a 'Contact Us' page where users can submit feedback. The requirement engineer has identified the following needs: users need to be able to view the company's contact information, and users need to be able to submit feedback. Which of the following statements correctly describes the relationship between the needs and the requirements for this scenario?
